summary: Full E2E testing of CourtBound app. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) AuthPage missing redirect after login/register, (2) track_college endpoint returning MongoDB ObjectId causing 500 errors. All 17 backend tests pass, all frontend flows verified.

issues: Uses browser native date picker (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of styled component - minor UX inconsistency

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AuthPage.js was missing useNavigate redirect after successful login/register - user stayed on /login page
FIXED: POST /api/my-colleges returned MongoDB ObjectId (_id) in response causing 500 Internal Server Error - doc.pop('_id', None) added before return
test_credentials: admin@courtbound.com / admin123, testplayer2026@test.com / test1234 (created during testing)
seed_data_creation: 25 colleges pre-seeded. Registered testplayer2026@test.com as test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs fixed. All flows tested: auth (login/register/logout), dashboard stats, college directory (25 colleges), search/filter, track/untrack, college detail with coaches, AI compose (Duke/Jon Scheyer tested), communications, AI strategy, navigation. App fully functional.

bug1.root_cause: handleSubmit called login()/register() but had no useNavigate to redirect to /dashboard. User remained on /login page.
bug1.fix: Added useNavigate import and navigate('/dashboard') call after successful auth

bug2.issue: 500 Internal Server Error when tracking a college
bug2.root_cause: After db.tracked_colleges.insert_one(doc), MongoDB mutates the doc dict by adding '_id: ObjectId(...)'. Spreading **doc in return included non-JSON-serializable ObjectId.
bug2.fix: Added doc.pop('_id', None) before return statement
